title: idea_dedupe
description: Skill request spec for idea_dedupe: deterministically removes duplicate ideas from a list using exact, normalized, or levenshtein comparison.

request_id.description: Unique identifier for this skill request (for tracing and deduplication)

ideas.description: List of idea strings to deduplicate

similarity_threshold.description: Minimum similarity ratio (0–1) to consider two ideas duplicates. Used only by the levenshtein method.

method.description: Comparison method: exact (byte-identical), normalized (case+punctuation-insensitive), levenshtein (edit-distance similarity)

outputs.description: skill_result_spec — populated by the skill after execution

unique_ideas.description: Deduplicated list of ideas (canonical form, first occurrence preserved)

canonical.description: The first/canonical occurrence of the idea

duplicates.description: Later occurrences judged to be duplicates of canonical

duplicate_groups.description: Groups of duplicate ideas, each with a canonical representative

removed_count.description: Total number of duplicate ideas removed
